name: Order Tracking Status Import Wizard
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can automate order status updates and tracking information management through bulk imports, significantly reducing manual order processing time and improving fulfillment accuracy. This capability enables you to update multiple orders simultaneously with status changes, tracking numbers, and shipping details, helping streamline warehouse operations and customer communication."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When you use the order tracking status import wizard, you typically improve operational efficiency by processing hundreds of order updates in minutes rather than hours. This automation helps reduce order processing time and ensures accurate tracking notifications reach business customers promptly, supporting better fulfillment operations and customer order experience across your B2B ecommerce platform."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Import Wizard"}], "data-id": "import-wizard"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can import order shipping tracking updates using the complex import wizard. Use the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.neto.com.au/assets/downloads/templates/import_order_tracking.csv", "children": [{"text": "import tracking template"}]}, {"text": " to populate your data so that it can be imported. Consult the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": "table below"}]}, {"text": " for the required and available fields. To import tracking updates:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Import data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Order Shipping Tracking / Status Update", "bold": true}, {"text": " radio button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Perform complex import", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and choose "}, {"text": "Start Data Import Wizard", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Choose File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and upload your CSV file. Then click "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll now be on the field mapping step. On the left hand side are a list of the column names in Neto (database field names). To the right of them are column headers from your file. To ensure data from your file goes into the correct field in Neto, select the database field name that best matches your file field names."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The action field changes the order status. Available options are Backorder, Pick, Pack, or Dispatched. This is a required field."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once complete, click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Update Options", "bold": true}, {"text": " section, you can choose whether or not you with to "}, {"text": "Allow updates to unapproved orders", "bold": true}, {"text": ". When ready, click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You're now ready to import your customer file. If you want to save your settings select the checkbox and enter a template name. Click the "}, {"text": "Process File Now", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to complete the import wizard."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The import process will be queued to run, and update the your sales orders."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Click on the export process ID to view a page with the status of your import. Click the "}, {"text": "Run Now", "bold": true}, {"text": " button on this page to start the process immediately."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Import Fields"}], "data-id": "import-fields"}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Type"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Description"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Length"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example Data"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-eb82c77e"}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Type"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Description"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Length"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example Data"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "*Order ID"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "String"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The order number the tracking tracking details will be applied to. This is a required field."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "15"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "N10007"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "*Action"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "String"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Changes the order status. This is a required field."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "9"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ship"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Do Not Send Email"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Boolean"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If set to Yes, the tracking email will not be sent to the customer."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "No"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Skip Record"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Boolean"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If set to Yes, the tracking details will not be import for this order."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "No"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "*SKU"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "String"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Used to apply shipping details to a product line on the order.
